description.value: The thick murky waters of the Deepmarsh are navigable to those who understand their tricks. You ignore difficult terrain and uneven ground caused by swamps and sewers. You don't gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] condition for not having a swim Speed during aquatic combat. If you have a swim Speed, you ignore non-magical difficult terrain while swimming underwater, but not greater difficult terrain.
